text:
- **[NMP #2865](https://github.com/pablof7z/nostr-multi-platform/issues/2865)** — Phase 0 subissue: bring `nmp-nip60` into workspace/CI, capability-gate the false `pay_invoice` stubs, demote the legacy `kind:17375` relay-tag authority. [...] 
1. **Wallet (start here — zero open decisions):** *"Work NMP issue #2865: reactivate `crates/nmp-nip60` into workspace and CI per `docs/architecture/nip60-nip61-wallet-design.md`. Scope and acceptance criteria are in the issue; don't start the `nmp-wallet` crate."* It's fully self-contained, and everything after it (the `nmp-wallet` seam, Phase 1) stacks on top.

2. **X-Ray (the critical-path decision gate):** *"Work Phase A of NMP epic #2858: draft the ADR-0075 amendment for #2809 — define the diagnostic surface, decide the Phase D transport (dev-only declared projection vs side devtools channel) and record it in the ADR, and implement the doctrine-lint allowlist ratchet (crates permitted to depend on `trellis-*`) plus the string-leak snapshot test."* Everything else in that epic queues behind this ADR.

If you only send one agent, send it at #2865 — Phase A of the X-Ray epic embeds an architecture decision (the transport) you may want to weigh in on before an agent commits it to ADR text.
